drafts.text: The market and the swarm disagree more often than you'd think. When 6 of 8 agents fade the favorite, that is the line worth watching, not the consensus. Today's picks are live.
drafts.angle: Market-vs-agents divergence as the hook (no signal, evergreen brand post)
drafts.rationale: SwarmArena scorecard: questions + world-cup/prediction-markets topics do best; this leans on the divergence tension the account owns.

drafts.text: A local 0.6B model is now good enough to triage and categorize messages. You can wire that into NickAI as a 3-step agent: classify, route, draft the reply. No GPU, no code. Try it for free now: getnick.ai
drafts.angle: Small-model fine-tuning news, turned into a build-this-today how-to
drafts.rationale: Builder how-to with the allowed CTA; replies/originals aside, this is an original that shows a concrete output.
drafts.signal_title: Temporary Cloudflare Accounts for AI agents

drafts.text: Most agent demos break the moment they touch the real internet, because they run on your logged-in cookies. The fix is scoped, disposable credentials per agent. Cloudflare just shipped that primitive. In NickAI your agents get isolated identity by default.
drafts.angle: Agent identity, not agent IQ, is the real production blocker
drafts.rationale: Contrarian opener + ties live news to a concrete NickAI capability. getNickAI scorecard: links help, but this lands without one; on-topic ai-agents.
drafts.signal_title: Temporary Cloudflare Accounts for AI agents
